name: Boone County High School
description: Boone County High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Florence, KY. There are 4 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Crossroads Church Florence
description: Come play pickleball at Crossroads Church Florence in Florence, KY! There are 5 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: First Church of Christ - Burlington Campus
description: Come play pickleball at First Church of Christ - Burlington Campus in Burlington, KY! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Sports Of All Sorts
description: Sports Of All Sorts is a place to play pickleball in Florence, KY. There are 9 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, food, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — 33 dollars a month or 10 dollars per visit

name: St. Henry Athletic center
description: St. Henry Athletic center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Florence, KY. There are 8 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are private.
fees: Private — First Hour Free for Silver Sneakers; otherwise $5 per hour 85

name: Union pickleball courts
description: Union pickleball courts is a place to play pickleball in Union, KY. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
